diagrams.title: Time Series Decomposition Model
diagrams.description: Shows how a time series is decomposed into its four components: Original Data = Trend + Seasonality + Cyclical + Random
diagrams.purpose: Understand that complex time series can be broken down into understandable components for better forecasting

diagrams.title: Exponential Smoothing Weight Decay
diagrams.description: Visual representation showing how weights decrease exponentially for older observations in exponential smoothing
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how recent data dominates the forecast while older data has diminishing influence
